docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $9,118.39 FILED BY MCMILLAN, LISA CRAIB AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, RICQUEL LYNNETTE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-09-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE WAS NOT LISTED SERVED MAY-30-2025, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT NEWMAN, RICQUEL LYNNETTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-09-2025 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-09-2025 BY VISITING JUDGE CINDEE MAYFIELD. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF LISA CRAIB MCMILLAN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT RICQUEL LYNNETTE NEWMAN IS PRESENT. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. NOT REPORTED. (D506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-09-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MCMILLAN, LISA CRAIB RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NEWMAN, RICQUEL LYNNETTE $6,686.41 PRINCIPAL, $75.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,761.41 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
